title: BlindSpotCheck: IEC 62443 multi-tenant monitoring blind-spot evaluator
description: BlindSpotCheck evaluates the NC-1 & NC-2 & NC-3 biconditional from Kim (2026) "Compliant Yet Blind: Measuring and Closing Multi-Tenant Monitoring Gaps in IEC 62443" against an arbitrary multi-tenant IEC 62443-governed architecture described in YAML. It classifies each conduit as blind-spot, borderline, resolved-by-SP, or no-cross-AO and emits a per-conduit mitigation path. Framework-grounded example architectures (airport common-use terminal, rail passenger station, maritime container terminal) are bundled.
